channel.title: shell on james
channel.description: Recent content in shell on james

item.title: commands
item.description: Bash, Terminal, Cmd, PowerShell standard basic operations sudo rm -frv ~/.Trash cd \ dir /a /r .DS_STORE del /s /q /f /a .DS_STORE del /s /q /f /a ._.* touch mkdir mv # can rename rm (-r) cp echo cat less tail head <command> | xclip -sel c # to clipboard connecting commands <command> > file.txt <command> 2> file.txt # error code <command> >> file.txt # append to file <command> < file.

item.title: scripting
item.description: #variables variable_name='value' # no spaces! echo "string string $variable_namestring string" echo "string string ${variable_name}string string" # same echo "string string `<command>` string string" result=`<command>` echo "string string $resultstring string" read <variable_name> # user input # arguments $n # nth argument # if if [[ <a = b> ]]; then # [] is more reliable, but [[]] is better <action> elif [[ <> ]]; then <> else <> fi -gt -lt -ge -le # greater less than equal # loops and arguments for arg in "$@"; do # all arguments echo "@arg" done # functions function_name() { } function function_name() { } function_name <args> # call with args # running .
